  "findings": [
    "Missing surge protection on field side of instrument loops",
    "Field devices and I/O cards exposed to transient overvoltage damage",
    "Loop cannot be closed out or signed off until protection is installed and verified"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install surge protective devices per loop drawings and manufacturer requirements",
    "Verify SPD ratings match signal type, voltage, and grounding scheme",
    "Re-perform loop check and continuity/insulation verification after SPD installation",
    "Update loop check documentation and obtain QC sign-off"
  ],
  "rationale": "Surge protection on the field side is required to protect instrumentation and I/O from transients. Its absence is a non-compliant defect that prevents final acceptance, even though the wiring is roughed in. Work is estimated at 70 percent complete because the physical installation appears done but cannot be closed out until the defect is corrected and re-verified.",
  "references": [
    "loop drawings",
    "ISA 5.1"
  ]
}
